name: Azmodan
bio:
Abyssal Blacksmith cursed into a warrior due to betrayal. He learned to convert pain into power, became a leader of the Demon Faction, and protects others while seeking revenge.

Role: Shield Protection
Specialty: A frontline Protection-type hero that can revive immediately after death and has the ability to apply [Curse].

skillSlots.name: Purgatory Smash
skillSlots.description: Attacks the enemy with highest Crit, dealing 300% ATK as P.DMG and applying 1 stack of [Cursed Armor] to self.

skillSlots.name: Doomsday Arrives
skillSlots.description: Attacks enemy frontline and midline targets, dealing 240% P.DMG plus P.DMG equal to 10% of target's Max HP (max 200% of own ATK).

effects.name: Undying Demonlord
effects.description: Revives immediately and recovers 30% Max HP when suffering Fatal DMG (triggers once per battle).

effects.name: Undying Demonlord
effects.description: Recovers 8% Max HP when attacks Crit.

effects.name: Undying Demonlord
effects.description: HP recovered upon revive increased to 60% Max HP.

effects.name: Undying Demonlord
effects.description: Immediately casts [Doom Advent] once upon revive (this effect can only trigger once per battle).
